title: The Negro and the Law
venue: James Pott and Company, New York

license.note: Published 1903; public domain in the United States.

abstract: The Negro and the Law (1903), by Wilford H. Smith. From The Negro Problem.
excerpt: _ By WILFORD H. SMITH The law and how it is dodged by enactments infringing upon the rights guaranteed to the freedmen by constitutional amendment. A powerful plea for justice for the Negro. [Illustration: WILFORD H. SMITH.] The colored people in the United States are...
